name: update_item
description: Update column values on an existing item in Monday.com. You can change the status, dates, people assignments, text fields, and any other column type. Only the columns you specify in the column_values JSON string will be modified.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to update an item's column values.
parameters.example: mutation { change_multiple_column_values (board_id: 1234567890, item_id: 111222333, column_values: "{}") { id name } }

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the board containing the item.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the item to update.

parameters.name: column_values
parameters.description: A JSON string of column values to update. Keys are column IDs, values follow Monday's column value format.

body.query: mutation { change_multiple_column_values (board_id: 1234567890, item_id: 111222333, column_values: "{\"status\":{\"index\":1},\"date4\":{\"date\":\"2024-03-01\"}}") { id name column_values { id text value } }
